title: melica lanuginosa
intro: Melica lanuginosa, also known as the woolly melic grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Melica lanuginosa include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Melica lanuginosa is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the dried roots or leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds with a solvent.
